name: Factory Droid

form_factor.comment: Droid CLI plus Factory App, IDE integrations, and Droid Computers. Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://docs.factory.ai/reference/cli-reference; Extension: https://docs.factory.ai/cli/integrations/ide-integrations; Web: https://app.factory.ai/.

released_in.comment: Public docs cover current Droid CLI and Factory platform surfaces.

latest_major_update.comment: Current CLI reference includes plugins, MCP, skills, hooks, worktrees, Droid Exec, and custom droids.

rules.comment: AGENTS.md appears in Factory configuration docs. Location: `AGENTS.md` and `.factory/` project configuration.

skills.comment: Skills can be managed and invoked from the CLI. Location: Factory Skills configuration in project/user Factory config; exact folder varies by scope.

hooks.comment: Lifecycle hooks are first-class slash-command managed features.

mcp_servers.comment: Supports stdio and HTTP MCP servers, registry browsing, env vars, and headers. Location: user `~/.factory/mcp.json` and project MCP configuration.

custom_commands.comment: Custom slash commands are directly managed in the CLI. Location: Factory custom slash-command configuration in project/user Factory config.

goal_command.comment: Factory documents custom slash commands via `/commands`; no built-in `/goal` for persistent objectives.

subagents.comment: Custom Droids are documented as subagents.

model_selection.comment: Model IDs can be selected with -m/--model and /model.

approval_mode.comment: Tiered autonomy levels control action permissions.

sandbox_mode.comment: Docs include Sandbox Beta and unsafe mode guidance for disposable containers.

resume.comment: Resume by session ID or last modified session.

continue.comment: Exec can continue an existing session; interactive defaults to the last modified session.

non_interactive.comment: droid exec is the headless automation mode.

output_format.comment: Search supports JSON output; API and readiness endpoints expose structured data.

telemetry.comment: Analytics/compliance APIs exist, but no user telemetry opt-out setting found.

hosted_agent.comment: Factory App and Droid Computers exist; CLI can register machines and run daemon/server flows.

custom_model_provider.comment: Bring Your Own Key/custom model path is documented.

pricing.value: Factory plans; usage details in Factory pricing
pricing.comment: CLI docs route to Factory plans and pricing.

notes: One of the most feature-dense CLI surfaces in this update: autonomy levels, worktrees, custom droids, plugins, MCP, statusline, skills, hooks, and headless exec.

transcripts.comment: Location: local searchable Droid session data is managed by Factory CLI; exact transcript database path is not documented in the CLI reference.
